summary:
The provided literature contains no documentation linking Enlimomab directly to improved stroke outcomes. While related monoclonal antibodies carry an increased stroke risk due to cardiovascular side effects, there remains zero evidence supporting beneficial impacts from using Enlimomab specifically in stroke care.

\boxed{B}
